questoin: How do I reset my password?
expexted: Go to account settings and click Reset Password.
kontext: Passwords must be at least 8 characters.

questoin: Where can I download the invoice?
expexted: Invoices are available under Billing > History.
kontext: Billing history is retained for 24 months.

questoin: Can I add a second user to my account?
expexted: Yes — go to Settings > Team and invite them by email.
kontext: Team plans allow up to 5 users by default.

questoin: What happens if I miss a payment?
expexted: Your account is paused after a 7-day grace period.
kontext: Grace period policy applies to monthly plans only.
